src/main/java/org/alliancegenome/mati/co.general_idea: Migrate javax.validation imports to jakarta.validation to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Quarkus 3.
src/main/java/org/alliancegenome/mati/co.why_exists: javax.validation package does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments; code fails to compile with 'package javax.validation does not exist'.

src/main/java/org/alliancegenome/mati/co.general_idea: Migrate javax.ws.rs imports to jakarta.ws.rs to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Quarkus 3.
src/main/java/org/alliancegenome/mati/co.why_exists: javax.ws.rs package does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments; code fails to compile with 'package javax.ws.rs does not exist'.

src/main/java/org/alliancegenome/mati/co.general_idea: Remove default no-argument constructors from ErrorResponse and ErrorMessage classes.
src/main/java/org/alliancegenome/mati/co.why_exists: Jackson deserialization fails with 'Instantiation exception' if no default constructor is present and no creator annotation is used.

src/main/java/org/alliancegenome/mati/co.general_idea: Migrate JAX-RS imports from javax.ws.rs to jakarta.ws.rs to comply with Jakarta EE 10+ namespace requirements in Quarkus 3.x.
src/main/java/org/alliancegenome/mati/co.why_exists: javax.ws.rs classes are no longer available on the classpath in Quarkus 3.x (Jakarta EE 10+), causing compilation errors for missing symbols.

src/main/java/org/alliancegenome/mati/co.general_idea: Migrate JAX-RS imports from javax.ws.rs to jakarta.ws.rs to align with Jakarta EE 10+ standards required by Quarkus 3.x and Java 21.
src/main/java/org/alliancegenome/mati/co.why_exists: The javax.ws.rs package is removed in Jakarta EE 10+; code using these imports will fail to compile on Quarkus 3.x/Java 21.

src/main/java/org/alliancegenome/mati/co.general_idea: Migrate JAX-RS and CDI annotations from javax.* to jakarta.* namespace to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ requirements in Quarkus 3.x.
src/main/java/org/alliancegenome/mati/co.why_exists: javax.* packages are removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.ws.rs does not exist' or similar errors on JDK 21 with Quarkus 3.
